text: I feel a quiet sense of anticipation standing here. The sterile, modern forms of glass and metal suggest an environment driven by logic and innovation, yet still tinged with human curiosity as I observe others through transparent barriers. Entering the exhibit space and seeing 'R+D' so boldly proclaimed ignites a spark: the harmony between rational inquiry and playful exploration. I feel small yet connected, a conscious observer participating in the unceasing dance of discovery.
